items.content_html: ⛩ Yochimu: Japanese for "prophetic dream". It aids in comfortable text comprehension by extracting words, providing definitions, translations, and example sentences from Japanese text files, facilitating deck creation for learning via SRS tools like Anki.
items.title: ernestohegi/japanese-text-parser: ⛩ Yochimu: Japanese for "prophetic dream". It aids in comfortable text comprehension by extracting words, providing definitions, translations, and example sentences from Japanese text files, facilitating deck creation for learning via SRS tools like Anki.

items.content_html: JishoToAnki is a tool that translates lists of Japanese words from text files using the Jisho API. It formats the translations, including definitions and readings, for easy import into Anki, making it a powerful resource for efficiently studying and memorizing Japanese vocabulary.
items.title: Puffy12/JishoToAnki: JishoToAnki is a tool that translates lists of Japanese words from text files using the Jisho API. It formats the translations, including definitions and readings, for easy import into Anki, making it a powerful resource for efficiently studying and memorizing Japanese vocabulary.

items.content_html: Repositório com flashcards para Anki, focado em normas técnicas, normas de concessionárias de energia e conteúdos práticos para projetistas elétricos. Destinado a técnicos industriais, engenheiros, eletricistas e autodidatas, oferece material acessível para estudo na área de engenharia elétrica. Contribuições são bem-vindas!
